text:
(German for Credit) is an organization that appears in Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. 

Profile

KREDIT is a support organization by WILLE. They work to support the lives of those who have survived the Near Third Impact. Originally, it was operated directly by WILLE, but it was changed to independent organization.

Operational History

Known Members

Ryoji Kaji

Equipment Used

Non-Combat Equipment

Angel-Sealing Hex Pillar
